name: preapproval-verification-tool
description: AI tool that reads OPWDD Self-Direction pre-approval application PDFs, verifies provider websites, captures date-stamped evidence, and produces review-ready reports.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
